Bizarre Lineage Prestige Guide

Everything you need to know about the Prestige system. Up to 3 Prestige levels for permanent bonuses.

Leveling Prestige Awakening

What Is Prestige?

Prestige resets your character level to 1 but grants permanent bonuses and additional Stand storage. You can prestige up to 3 times, each requiring you to reach max level again.

Prestige Requirements

1

Prestige 1

  • Level 50 (max)
  • $10,000 cash
  • +5 Prestige Points
  • +1 Stand Storage Slot
2

Prestige 2

  • Level 50 (again)
  • $25,000 cash
  • +5 Prestige Points
  • +1 Stand Storage Slot
  • Unlocks Spin Sub-Ability
3

Prestige 3 (Max)

  • Level 50 (again)
  • $50,000 cash
  • +5 Prestige Points
  • +1 Stand Storage Slot
  • Unlocks exclusive cosmetics

How to Prestige — Step by Step

  1. Reach max level (50) and accumulate the required cash amount
  2. Travel to TC Hospital (Bus Stop 10)
  3. Find and interact with the Arch Mage NPC
  4. Confirm the prestige — your level resets to 1, but you keep your Stand and Sub-Abilities

What You Keep vs. What Resets

✅ Keep❌ Reset
Current StandCharacter Level → 1
Sub-AbilitiesStat Points (redistributable)
Fighting StyleCash spent on prestige
Prestige PointsQuest progress

💡 Pro Tip

After prestiging, leveling is faster because you already have a max-level Stand. Use your strong abilities to farm high-level areas from Level 1. Check our Leveling Guide for the optimal route.
